title: T-024 — spec_sign_modal (pre-flight checklist + EsignBlock, parity)
prompt:
# T-024 — spec_sign_modal

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §11.3 V-QA-SPEC-002/005, §13.2, §8.5 prototype spec_sign_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `SpecSignModal` Client Component that runs server-computed pre-flight checklist (V-QA-SPEC-002 params have test_method, V-QA-SPEC-003 min<=target<=max, V-QA-SPEC-005 role=quality_lead) and on PASS allows EsignBlock to capture pin_proof; on Sign click submits to approveSpec (T-019).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/SpecSignModal.tsx` shadcn Dialog.
2. Calls Server Action `getSpecApprovalChecklist(specId)` returning [{key, label, passed:bool, message?}].
3. Renders read-only Checkbox list (each item disabled with green/red icon).
4. Sign button enabled only when all items passed AND EsignBlock has produced valid pin_proof.
5. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:159-206`.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/SpecSignModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/getSpecApprovalChecklist.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/SpecSignModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:159-206, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (header + read-only checklist + EsignBlock + Cancel/Sign footer in same order), visuals (shadcn Dialog/Checkbox/Alert/Button only — no native checkbox), and interaction (checklist items are read-only/server-computed, Sign disabled until all items pass AND PIN ready) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given the checklist has at least one failing item, when the user enters a valid PIN, then the Sign button stays disabled and a tooltip 'qa.spec.checklist_unmet' is shown
3. Given all checks pass and pin_proof is valid, when the user clicks Sign, then approveSpec(specId, pin_proof) is called once and the modal closes on success

pipeline_inputs.description: Spec sign modal: server-computed pre-flight checklist + EsignBlock + Sign action; parity with spec_sign_modal prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Modal Dialog with read-only Checkbox list driven by getSpecApprovalChecklist Server Action (per prototype translation notes — checks NOT hardcoded). EsignBlock primitive (T-012) handles PIN capture. Sign button disabled until all items pass AND pin_proof present. On submit calls approveSpec(specId, pin_proof) and closes. Honor: server pre-flight, no client hash, immutability transition handled server-side.
out_of_scope: Do not allow direct DB writes from this modal
acceptance_criteria: Given the modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:159-206, then it has parity on structure (header + read-only checklist + EsignBlock + Cancel/Sign footer in same order), visuals (shadcn Dialog/Checkbox/Alert/Button only), and interaction (checklist read-only/server-computed, Sign disabled until all pass AND PIN ready) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given the checklist has at least one failing item, when the user enters a valid PIN, then the Sign button stays disabled with tooltip key qa.spec.checklist_unmet
Given all checks pass and pin_proof is valid, when the user clicks Sign, then approveSpec(specId, pin_proof) is called exactly once and the modal closes on success
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/SpecSignModal.test.tsx asserting parity structure, disabled state when checks fail, single approveSpec call on success
risk_red_lines: Do not hardcode the checklist items in the client (server-computed only per translation notes)
Do not allow Sign click to send a hash (server computes)
Do not call approveSpec more than once on rapid double-click (debounce)
